title: 毎日王冠の後に・運命,彼方に集いて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro Ardan! Mejiro Ardan has overtaken
Oguri Cap! She's taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Although I claimed victory, Oguri really was
quite the formidable opponent! She's truly one of
the greats of our time!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was an incredible performance. It looks like I
was still underestimating you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sheesh, I can't afford to give you an inch, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I felt it in your running—a desire to barrel through
and pulverize everything. That's not something I
get to witness every day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Inari...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What about the autumn Tenno Sho? You'll be
there, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I intend to be.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Then that's where I'll beat you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's on, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Likewise, Oguri. I wouldn't have it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
For the record, I'm also runnin' the autumn Tenno
Sho. Creek, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(That means the Eternal Top Three will all be
there!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I like that fire in your eyes! You know,
you're actually pretty easy to read.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Better buckle up though. You're in for the ride of
a lifetime. I'll be seeing you, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It appears as though luck is on our side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Eternal Top Three will all be present. I
couldn't have wished for a finer opportunity.
choice_data_list: Let's not lose any of today's momentum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I shall give the autumn Tenno Sho all I
am, and all I've ever had.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And then... I shall claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
History, and this very moment... Who will they
smile upon? The hour in which we'll find out is
rapidly approaching...
